ValidationRule.description: [AUT,CHE,HRV,HUN,SVN, SRB]: Restriction for not entering Sphere_of_Influence__c value when the case catagory is "Quality management" and Extternal_Case_Detail__c is " ALD clients services"
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND ( NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), ISPICKVAL( External_Case_Category__c,"Quality management"),
NOT(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"ALD clients services")), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Sphere_of_Influence__c))), CONTAINS( $Label.ALDCRM_Commercial_Gesture_Amount_Record_Types, RecordTypeId ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please leave the picklist "Sphere of Influence" empty. It should only be used when Detail "ALD clients services" has been selected.
